mobilePdf.ready: Tap to open the full PDF certificate.

programsData.title: Prenatal & Maternal Care
programsData.description: Comprehensive healthcare for expectant mothers including regular check-ups, nutrition counseling, birth preparedness, and postpartum support.

programsData.title: Early Childhood Development
programsData.description: Immunization drives, developmental screenings, growth monitoring, and early stimulation programs for infants and toddlers.

programsData.title: Nutrition Programs
programsData.description: Mid-day meal programs, nutrition supplements, awareness campaigns, and kitchen gardens to combat malnutrition at every stage.

programsData.title: Education Support
programsData.description: Scholarships, school supplies, after-school tutoring, digital literacy, and career guidance for school-age children.

programsData.title: Youth Empowerment
programsData.description: Skill development, mentorship, leadership training, and career counseling to prepare teenagers for independent adult life.

programsData.title: Child Protection
programsData.description: Advocacy, community awareness, helplines, and support systems to protect children from abuse, exploitation, and trafficking.

fivePillars.desc1: WOMBTO18 Foundation operates as an integrated child health non-profit platform - uniting
fivePillars.desc2: across five pillars, delivered through schools, hospitals, and communities. Serving
fivePillars.bottomDesc2: - from the moment of conception through adolescence, designed as connected infrastructure rather than isolated interventions.

upcomingCamps.desc: Our upcoming camps offer a chance to serve the community while earning rewards through our dynamic coin pool system.
upcomingCamps.defaultDesc: Free health check-ups, basic consultations and essential health awareness for a stronger community.

hero.desc: From prenatal care to preparing young adults for life, our programs ensure no child is left behind. Choose a program to support and track your impact in real time.

careContinuum.title: The Lifelong Health Journey
careContinuum.desc1: From the very first day to young adulthood, we ensure no critical health milestone is missed through our

stage1.title: Foundation of Life
stage1.desc: Critical early protection with BCG, Polio, DPT, Hepatitis B, and Measles vaccines. A robust start for a healthy life.

stage2.title: School-Age Immunity
stage2.desc: DPT Boosters, Typhoid, HPV, and Tdap. Protecting children as they enter school and preparing adolescents for adulthood safely.

stage3.title: Mental Wellness
stage3.prenatalTitle: Maternal mental health, bonding, stress reduction
stage3.prenatalDesc: Parent handbooks, antenatal class integration, WhatsApp module
stage3.age05Title: Early attachment, emotional security, sensory play
stage3.age05Desc: Parent workshops, anganwadi tie-ups, illustrated booklets
stage3.age612Title: SEL, classroom emotional regulation, peer relationships
stage3.age612Desc: School-based modules, teacher training, interactive group sessions
stage3.age1318Title: Identity formation, digital wellness, career anxiety
stage3.age1318Desc: School counsellor training, peer mentor programme, parent sessions

flagship.desc: Our award-winning programs designed to deliver comprehensive healthcare inside schools and ensure zero missed vaccinations across communities.

integratedSchoolHealth.desc: India's first integrated school health delivery model, designed for phased expansion across partner schools. Covering physical, mental, dental, nutritional, and environmental wellness across the entire school year.
col1Items: Annual screenings: vision, dental, BMI, hearing, posture
Doctor-led health camps: paediatrics, dermatology, orthopaedics
WASH education: water, sanitation and hygiene awareness
First aid and CPR training for staff and senior students
Daily health monitoring via Student Wellness App
col2Items: Mental wellness and Social Emotional Learning (SEL)
Green Cohort: every student plants a geo-tagged tree
Emergency preparedness — NDRF, fire, earthquake drills
Adolescent health and menstrual hygiene workshops
Parent engagement sessions — quarterly health briefings
Annual School Health Report & Compliance Certificate

vaccineReminder.desc1: For every scheduled vaccine in a child's immunisation calendar (National Immunisation Schedule + IAP + ACVIP guidelines), parents receive
vaccineReminder.desc2: ensuring no critical dose is missed.

emergency.desc1: We prepare children, schools, and families to respond confidently to natural disasters, health emergencies, and unforeseen crises. Aligned with
emergency.desc2: , and India's national school safety protocols.

cards.title: First Aid & Emergency Response
cards.desc: First aid and emergency response training for students and school staff.

cards.title: Evacuation Drills
cards.desc: School-wide drills for fire, flood, earthquake, and pandemic scenarios.

cards.title: Post-Crisis Mental Health
cards.desc: Mental health support modules for post-crisis trauma and stress management.

cards.title: Media Literacy & Digital Safety
cards.desc: Responsible digital behaviour and media literacy training during emergencies.

goGreen.desc1: Health and climate are inextricably linked. Our Go Green Initiative trains rural communities in disaster preparedness while planting trees to offset carbon footprints, creating India's first

features.title: Disaster Ready
features.desc: First-aid training and emergency protocol drills for community leaders.

features.title: Carbon Offset
features.desc: 1 tree planted for every Rs. 5000 donated. Receive your official Go Green Certificate.

vision.title: Vision for Impact
vision.desc: Laying the groundwork for scalable, transformative change across our core focus areas.

cards.title: Comprehensive Reach
cards.desc: Designed to scale across multiple underserved districts, targeting 4 key focus areas for complete child development.

cards.title: Sustainable Model
cards.desc: Building a transparent, milestone-driven financial framework ensuring long-term operational stability.

cards.title: Measurable Outcomes
cards.desc: Setting up rigorous data-driven frameworks to track, verify, and report every life changed along the journey.

cta.title: Want to Support a Program?
cta.desc: Choose a program close to your heart and make a targeted donation that creates lasting impact. Donations are eligible for tax benefits under Section 80G, as per applicable rules.
